topics.title: Internet Streaming Launch and Malibu Celebrity Culture
topics.summary: The studio discusses the launch of their internet streaming service, an online controversy regarding a leather jacket worn at a movie premiere, and the exclusive lifestyle of celebrities living in Malibu's 'Colony' area.

topics.title: Satellite Radio Growth and Archive Tapes
topics.summary: The studio discusses the growth of Sirius satellite radio, the impact of Howard Stern's presence on listener numbers, and plans to digitize and broadcast 23,000 hours of archived show tapes.

topics.title: Staffing and Content Management
topics.summary: The studio discusses the logistical challenges of organizing extensive archives, potential new hires for content curation, and the upcoming production schedule.

topics.title: Caller Claims to be a Racist
topics.summary: The show features a caller who identifies as a racist and makes disparaging remarks about interracial relationships before the segment transitions into music and news updates.

topics.title: Las Vegas Trip and Potential Venue Change
topics.summary: The studio discusses a recent trip to Las Vegas, including experiences at the Palms, interactions with fans like Maria Menounos, and the potential move of the show's broadcast location.

topics.title: Celebrity Rumors and Personal Reflections
topics.summary: The studio explores celebrity gossip regarding Jim Carrey and Jenny McCarthy before transitioning into personal anecdotes about family traditions, grave visits, and a shared journal.

topics.title: Film Reviews and Show Streaming
topics.summary: The studio discusses a film's critical reception, the expansion of the show's digital reach to international listeners, and various fan reactions regarding recent guests.

topics.title: Repetitive Commentary on a Favorite Character
topics.summary: The show features a continuous, repetitive declaration of a preference for a character named Eric the Midget.

topics.title: Freedom of Speech Award and Studio Promotions
topics.summary: The studio discusses a freedom of speech award, upcoming television specials featuring roast segments, and internal staff competitions for a new plasma television.

topics.title: Superman Film Review and Dominatrix Interview
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding the portrayal of Lex Luthor in the Superman film followed by an interview with a dominatrix about her career, extreme fetishes, and work for Gent magazine.

topics.title: Extreme Fetish Practices and Professional Services
topics.summary: The studio explores the business of extreme fetish services with a professional mistress who describes various high-paying client scenarios involving physical punishment, specialized equipment, and niche sexual acts.

topics.title: Adult Film Industry and Stuttering Challenges
topics.summary: The studio features an adult film performer discussing her experiences in the industry, followed by a series of betting games involving a guest with a stutter attempting to recite famous phrases.

topics.title: Father's Day Phone Calls
topics.summary: The studio features a segment where participants discuss their relationships with their fathers, including a recorded phone call with a deceased parent and reflections on seeking parental approval.

topics.title: Denise Richards and Richie Sambora Relationship
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding Denise Richards' relationship with Richie Sambora, her falling out with Heather Locklear, and various celebrity news segments including Dustin Diamond.

topics.title: Celebrity Power and Wealth Rankings
topics.summary: The studio reviews the Forbes 100 celebrity list, comparing the influence and earnings of figures like Tom Cruise, Oprah Winfrey, and Donald Trump.

topics.title: Celebrity Deals and Music Discussion
topics.summary: The studio explores celebrity endorsement deals, the impact of the show on book sales, and various musical performances while discussing a listener's concerns regarding high-energy hunting dogs.

topics.title: Current Events and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The show covers a variety of topics including a tragic car accident investigation, Alec Baldwin's legal battles, celebrity rumors involving Britney Spears and Jaleel White, international security concerns, and Bill Gates' transition from Microsoft.
